nasb.text: When the day came that Elkanah sacrificed, he would give portions to Peninnah his wife and to all her sons and her daughters;

esv.text: On the day when Elkanah sacrificed, he would give portions to Peninnah his wife and to all her sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 以利加拿在獻祭的那天，就把祭肉分給妻子毘尼拿和她所有的兒女。

ccb.text: 每当献完祭后，以利加拿就会把祭肉分给毗尼娜和她的儿女。
